title: Gro-Sure Aqua Gel Coated Smart Grass Lawn Seed, 25 m2, 1 kg
features: Guaranteed to grow* grass seed that will grow in shady, hardwearing, patchy or full sun areas; ideal for over seeding, repairs or new lawn establishment
Seed is coated in a aqua gel to help protect the seed from drying out while germinating, increasing germination success
Seed has been coated in an additional protective blue coating to reduce the likelihood of bird attacks reducing seed loss to wildlife
Seeds blue coating also helps identify where the seed has been sown as you apply
This products packaging features an in built seed applicator for simple and even application
This pack contains enough seed to cover a 25 sq m area (the equivalent of 2.5 car parking spaces)
description: From the manufacturer Gro-Sure Smart Lawn Seed is coated with Aqua Gel to maximise growing success. Gro-Sure Smart Lawn Seed is effective in full sun, shade, patches and worn areas. It works by absorbing up to 400x its weight in water, slowly releasing moisture to the seed to increase germination success. Coated with Aqua Gel technology For a strong, healthy lawn in hot and dry conditions For a lush, green lawn in shady conditions Quickly repairs patches on your lawn For a resistant lawn in hard-wearing areas Gro-Sure Smart Lawn Seed may be sown when the soil temperature is between 10-18°C Soaks up to 400 times it’s weight in water Slowly releases moisture to the seed Protects seed from under/over watering Increases germination success Keeps working for the whole season The lawn seed that's guaranteed to grow* *When pack instructions followed. We recommend using Westland SafeLawn, Aftercut Ultra Green Plus or Aftercut Lawn Thickener as lawn feeds at least 2 cuts after sowing your Gro-Sure Smart Lawn Seed.
